nasb.text: They hunted our steps So that we could not walk in our streets; Our end drew near, Our days were finished For our end had come.

esv.text: They dogged our steps so that we could not walk in our streets; our end drew near; our days were numbered, for our end had come.

cnv.text: 敵人追蹤我們，使我們不敢在自己的街道上行走。 我們的結局近了，我們的日子滿了； 我們的結局已經到了。

ccb.text: 敌人步步紧逼， 使我们不敢上自己的街。 我们的结局近了， 我们的日子到头了， 我们的末日来了！
